problem: What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient
mechanism: Cortical spreading depression mechanism in migraine
hypothesis: What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Cortical. Cortical spreading depression mechanism in migraine directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 29 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
